introSection: Stingray was a steel flying roller coaster located at Giant Wheel Park of Suzhou in Wuzhong, Suzhou, Jiangsu, China. The ride had a vertical lift hill, opened in 2009 and closed in 2018.
fullText: Stingray was a steel flying roller coaster located at Giant Wheel Park of Suzhou in Wuzhong, Suzhou, Jiangsu, China. The ride had a vertical lift hill, opened in 2009 and closed in 2018.
